book.author: Gambardella, Matthew
book.title: XML Developer's Guide
book.description: An in-depth look at creating applications with XML.

review.comment: Excellent overview of core XML concepts.
Good examples but slightly outdated on tooling.

book.author: Ralls, Kim
book.title: Midnight Rain
book.description: A former rainmaker struggles with finding her power in a fantasy setting.

book.author: Corets, Eva
book.title: Maeve Ascendant
book.description: After the collapse of a minor kingdom, a warrior princess fights to restore her line.
